description: Style Note Created for today's generation, this lotto shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for Sports and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love! Product Details White ankle length shoe with central lace-ups, overlays and stitched detailing Padded tongue and inner Plastic midsole Three piece rubber TPU outsole Material and Care Synthetic Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight Remove dust with a dry clean cloth
